top_candidates.reason: Planner-worker model mixes preserved quality while cutting the cost of long-running coding swarms by almost an order of magnitude.
Benchmark scores moved by more than the leaderboard gap when only infra limits changed.
Concrete MCP and tool-interface advice connects eval loops, schema design, and token-efficient responses.
Durable execution, decoupled state, and self-healing environments are framed as the real operating layer for background agents.
Tiered coding-model economics and selective multi-agent escalation give a current routing playbook with hard numbers.
